answer:
If you’re starting ecom from scratch, I don’t have a specific link pulled up to send you right this second, but the one “type” of video I’d tell you to watch is the full start-to-finish build where I literally go: find a product with AI, build the store with AI, and make the ads with AI. That’s the bread and butter because it shows you the whole workflow, not just theory.

And honestly bro, don’t get stuck binge-watching. Watch that style of video once, then immediately do it yourself the same day. There’s a window of time right now where moving fast with AI is an unfair advantage.

If you want, tell me which lane you’re trying to do: dropshipping with TikTok/Meta ads, or more “faceless” content that funnels into a product?

retrieved.content: Make sure when you're trying to generate digital products or pictures or anything, you always ask CHAGBT to give you the prompt because these tools know how to communicate with each other way better than we know how to communicate with them. So, here's the prompt. It says, "You're a top tier digital product creator and resell expert." And it goes through and explains exactly how it's structured, exactly what we need. And then now we can take that prompt and we can generate our own digital product. So, what we'll do is we'll open up a new chat. We'll paste this script completely from the other chat and we'll put it here. And it should immediately start to get to work on our digital product.
